name: o-coast-hold
description: From orbit, release the O free-coast (real Keplerian orbit) and hold — assert the orbit is sustained (radius spread < 2%) at v_circ over a multi-period window.
_notes: Precondition: already in low/high_orbit (run ascent-to-orbit first, or start airborne above 384). The O verb (nav:orbit) seeds v = v_circ along the yaw heading; gravity then holds the orbit. hold_s samples orbit_r; a stable orbit keeps the spread tiny. Raise hold_s toward one orbital period for a full-lap check.

legs.name: aim prograde (yaw heading sets the orbit plane)
